description: Add task status tracking and filtering in the task list.

userStories.title: Add task status storage with pending default
userStories.description: As a product team, I want each task to persist a status with a default of pending so that existing and new tasks have a consistent lifecycle state.
acceptanceCriteria: Tasks persist a status value in storage
Existing tasks default to 'pending' after migration
New tasks default to 'pending' when status is omitted
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add backend task status update action
userStories.description: As a user, I want to update a task status from allowed values so that progress changes are saved reliably.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend accepts pending, in_progress, and done status values
Invalid status values are rejected with a clear error
Status update endpoint or action persists changes
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show task status badge on task cards
userStories.description: As a user, I want task cards to display a status badge so that I can quickly scan task progress.
acceptanceCriteria: Each task card renders a badge that reflects current status
Badge states cover pending, in progress, and done
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control in task list rows
userStories.description: As a user, I want to change status directly from the task list so that updates require minimal navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Task list row includes control to set pending, in progress, or done
Changing control value triggers backend update and reflects saved status
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter task list by status
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter tasks by status so that I can focus on a specific work state.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter options include All, Pending, In Progress, and Done
Selecting a filter updates visible task rows accordingly
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
